record.field: # Check if employee has any active loan lines due in this period loan_lines = env['hr.loan.line'].search([ ('employee_id', '=', employee.id), ('paid', '=', False), ('date', '>=', payslip.date_from), ('date', '<=', payslip.date_to), ('loan_id.state', '=', 'validate'), ]) result = bool(loan_lines)

# Sum all due loan installments for this period loan_lines = env['hr.loan.line'].search([ ('employee_id', '=', employee.id), ('paid', '=', False), ('date', '>=', payslip.date_from), ('date', '<=', payslip.date_to), ('loan_id.state', '=', 'validate'), ]) result = -sum(loan_lines.mapped('amount'))
Automatically deducts pending loan installments from the payslip.
